subcodes.first_line: Illumine the faces with this Light which God hath made sovereign over all lights. Say: This is a Day wherein is manifested adornment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: نور الوجوه بهذا النور الذی جعله الله مهیمنا علی الانوار قل هذا یوم فیه تزین
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
